review_title: The Upgrade and Service We Were Looking For
review_content:
Switching to Jersey Watch has been a great experience for our organization. Their features are a major step up from where we previously hosted our website, and I especially appreciate how easy it is to make edits on the fly from my phone when needed.

I’ve also had consistently excellent experiences with their help desk and customer service team. First, it’s refreshing to be able to speak with an actual human when problem-solving. Second, their team is attentive, responsive, and genuinely helpful throughout the process. Anytime I’ve had questions or needed assistance, they’ve been quick to respond and work through solutions.

One thing I’ve really appreciated is that they’re also open to feedback and suggestions on ways to improve their system, which says a lot about how much they care about their users’ experience.

From the platform itself to the customer support team, I would absolutely recommend Jersey Watch. 5/5 experience.

review_title: Had an issue with our registration…
review_content: Had an issue with our registration setup and emailed support expecting to wait days. Got a reply within an hour and they walked me through the fix. Our league has been using Jersey Watch for two seasons now and it just works.

review_title: I Registered incorrectly and they fixed it!
review_content: I accidentally registered my child for a different team, I sent a sent a message asking if they could help and received a response very quickly and they got him moved to the correct team. Easy peasy! Thanks for the help Hilary K!
Hilary and Kelly were super helpful, friendly and responsive. They got our issue resolved immediately and even followed up when they didn’t hear back from us right away. Outstanding customer service.

review_content: Jersey watch has worked endlessly help multiple programs I help run. They have gone above and beyond with all of my requests and needs. The knowledge and responsiveness of the specialist. I worked with Hilary Kleiman and they were top notch. Answered my question and researched my issue. I am completely satisfied.

I sent in a request for assistance and the response from Kelly Kuritar was within 5 minutes. She helped with me with everything I needed. I appreciate the timeliness, especially when in the middle of a project.

We needed a contact list created from an imported spreadsheet. The response was quick and right on target.

Can't say enough about how good Jersey Watch support is across the board.

review_title: We’ve been using JerseyWatch to manage…
review_content:
We’ve been using JerseyWatch to manage our track club and it’s been a game-changer. The platform makes it incredibly easy to build a clean website, register athletes, and collect payments all in one place. The customer support is fast, helpful, and always open to feedback.

As a coach, the biggest win has been how simple it is to communicate with our team and keep parents in the loop. If you’re running a youth sports program and want to look more professional without spending hours on tech, JerseyWatch is 100% worth it.
Very friendly and helpful. Exceptionally fast response time.

The Jersey Watch support team is truly top-tier—always friendly, prompt, and incredibly helpful when needed. It’s clear they care about their users and are committed to making the experience smooth and positive. Their service adds so much value to an already great platform!
